descripcion_en: Max HP increased by percentage. The higher your HP, the more DMG you can take.

DEF increased by percentage. The higher your DEF, the less DMG you take.
Crit increased by percentage. The higher your Crit, the more likely you are to land a critical hit.
TEN increased by percentage. The higher your TEN, the lower the chance of taking critical hits.
PEN increased by percentage. The higher your PEN, the higher your chance to deal bonus DMG.
